metadata.title: obsidian-attachment-name-formatting
metadata.description: Obsidian 插件用于格式化附件名称（文件名 附件类型 索引号.xxx）

regex.target: .log(`已启用 NoChange 选项，跳过重命名 ${item.link}`)
.log('将附件 "' + destinationFile.name + '" 重命名为 "' + destinationFile_path + tmpName + '"')
.log('将附件 "' + attachmentFile.path + '" 重命名为 "' + fullName + '"')
.log("正在获取所有未使用的附件...")
name: "导出当前文件中的附件"

regex.source: name: "Export All Unused Attachments in the Vault"
regex.target: name: "导出库中所有未使用的附件"
name: "重新扫描当前文件中的附件"

regex.source: text: "This operation will scan all files in the foler and rename the attachments in them."
regex.target: text: "此操作将扫描文件夹中的所有文件并重命名其中的附件。"

regex.source: text: "This operation can not be revoked, are you sure to keep doing this?"
regex.target: text: "此操作无法撤销，您确定要继续吗？"

regex.source: text: "Note: this operation will take some time, depends on the number of files."
regex.target: text: "注意：此操作将需要一些时间，具体取决于文件的数量。"

regex.source: text: 'This plugin will format all attachments in the format: "filename attachmentType indexNumber.xxx".'
regex.target: text: '此插件将按格式化所有附件："文件名 附件类型 索引号.xxx"。'

regex.source: text: "Each type of attachment will have individual index."
regex.target: text: "每种附件类型将有单独的索引号。"

regex.source: text: "Only recognize the file type that can be recognized by Obsidian."
regex.target: text: "仅识别Obsidian能够识别的文件类型。"

regex.source: text: "Image files: png, webp, jpg, jpeg, gif, bmp, svg"
regex.target: text: "图片文件：png, webp, jpg, jpeg, gif, bmp, svg"

regex.source: text: "Audio files: mp3, wav, m4a, ogg, 3gp, flac"
regex.target: text: "音频文件：mp3, wav, m4a, ogg, 3gp, flac"

regex.source: text: "Video files: mp4, webm, ogv, mov, mkv"
regex.target: text: "视频文件：mp4, webm, ogv, mov, mkv"

regex.source: text: '"webm" extension will be regard as video even if it can also be audio'
regex.target: text: '即使 "webm" 扩展名也可以作为音频，但它将被视为视频文件。'

regex.source: .setName("Handle same attachment used in different notes")
regex.target: .setName("处理在不同笔记中使用的相同附件")

regex.source: .setName("Add path hash at end of attachment name")
regex.target: .setName("在附件名称末尾添加路径哈希值")

regex.source: .setName("Exclude the note name in the attachment name")

regex.target: .setName("快捷菜单：导出当前文件中的附件")
.setName("快捷菜单：导出库中未使用的附件")

regex.source: .setName("Deletion After Exporting Attachments in Current File")
.setName("Deletion After Exporting Unused Attachments in Vault")
regex.target: .setName("导出库中未使用的附件后删除")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the format for connector between file name and attachment name, you can also set multiple connectors seperately.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置文件名和附件名之间的连接符格式，也可以分别设置多个连接符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose to how to handle the same attachment used in different notes.There are three options: 1. Default: Always rename with the note name; 2. Copy: Create a copy for the attachment; 3. NoChange: Stick to the first time that attachment is renamed, and will not occupy index number;")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择如何处理在不同笔记中使用的相同附件。共有三种选项：1. 默认：始终以笔记名重命名；2. 复制：为附件创建副本；3. 不更改：保留附件第一次被重命名时的状态，并且不占用索引号；")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatic formatting the attachments' name when changing note content")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改笔记内容时自动格式化附件名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add modify time after index to track the change time in file name")
regex.target: .setDesc("在索引后添加修改时间以在文件名中跟踪变更时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("For uniqueness in attachment names if there are note files with the same name (but at different levels)")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果存在同名但不同层级的笔记文件，则确保附件名称的唯一性")

regex.source: .setDesc("Exclude the note name when rename the attachment name, will enable time suffix and disable one attachment in many notes setting automically.")
regex.target: .setDesc("重命名附件时排除笔记名，将自动启用时间后缀并禁用一个附件用于多个笔记的设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The notes under these folders will not reformat auto format the attachment name")
regex.target: .setDesc("这些文件夹下的笔记将不会自动格式化附件名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("You can add subfolders for each attachment type under the attachment folder you set")
regex.target: .setDesc("您可以在设置的附件文件夹下为每种附件类型添加子文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle the display of export attachments in current file ribbon.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换显示当前文件中导出附件的快捷菜单。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle the display of export unused attachments ribbon. Will take long time for a large vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换显示导出未使用附件的快捷菜单。对于大型库，操作可能会耗时较长。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Autodeletion after exporting attachments in current file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("导出当前文件附件后自动删除。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Autodeletion after exporting unused attachments in vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("导出库中未使用的附件后自动删除。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable copy attachment link item in right-click menu.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在右键菜单中启用复制附件链接选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose to use relative path or absolute path.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择使用相对路径或绝对路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Logging the attachment name changes into file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将附件名称的更改记录到文件中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set where the log file saved. Note: change path will not move the old log.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置日志文件的保存位置。注意：更改路径不会移动旧日志。")
